# Copilot Instructions

## General rules
- All naming (classes, methods, variables, log messages) and comments are in English.
- XML doc comments on all public types and members.
- Log key business events at `Information` level; diagnostic details at `Debug`.
- Do not commit or push without explicit user instruction.

## Code style
- File-scoped namespaces.
- Fields and local variables start lowercase without _ prefix.
- Use `this.` in constructors to distinguish fields from parameters.
- Concise, factual comments for every method and key code section.
